title: Web Design & Development
description: A site that looks good, loads when you've got one bar of cell service, and works on every phone. You'll be able to update it yourself — no developer needed day-to-day. Every build includes written documentation and a training walkthrough.

title: Email Design & Development
description: Automated emails that go out when they should, say the right thing, and look great in every inbox. From a simple welcome sequence to a full campaign system. I've built these at enterprise scale for Wyndham.

title: SEO
description: Help people find you on Google. I make sure your site is structured the right way, loads fast (which Google rewards directly), and says the things your customers are actually searching for.
